titleStmt.title: SII 28.40: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 40. (A.R. No. 40 of 1913.) KĀRGUḌI, NAMAKKAL TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kailāsanāthasvāmin Temple, central shrine, south wall of the maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Sārvabhauma-chakravarttī Hoysaḷa Śrī Vīra-Rāmanātha Year 11, Mīna Śu. 3, Wednesday, Aśvati = 1266 A.D., March 10, f.d.t. ·45.

summary.p: Records the sale of the village Uṟandai alias Vīrasundaranallūr to the dēvarkaṉmis through the grace of Ādi-chaṇḍēśvaran in the temple of Śri-Kayilāsamuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Tirukkārkuḍi alias Vikkiramachōḻa-puram in Vaḍakarai-Karikāla-kaṉṉa-vaḷanāḍu by śri-Rāmaṉ Chakkaravarti, the agent-secretary of Kattikkāra-Somaiya-Deṇṇāyakkar (in line 4 referred to as Pakka-tikkāṟa-º) the mahā-pradhāṉi for a consideration of 16,000 kāśu. The village consisted of 8 mā of naṉchey and 8 vēli of puṉchey and common lands and trees and wells and had been purchased earlier from nine individuals. The sale was attested by the aforesaid śri Rāmaṉ-chakkaravarti and a long list of individuals. The sale further authorised the rights for gift, mortgage and sale (dān-ādhamana-vikraya) to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ § sārvvabhaumaccakkaravattikaḷ hocaḷa śrīvī
ra rāmaṉāta tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 1vatu varuṣam mīṉa nāyaṟṟu purvva pa
kṣattuṭ putaṉkiḻamaiyum tridhikaiyum peṟṟa Aśvati nāḷ
śrīmaṉu mahāpratāṉi pakkatikkāṟ comaiya teṇṇāyakkar kāri
yañ ceyvārkaḷil cīrāmaṉ cakkaravattiyeṉ Ūrvilai pramāṇa Icai
vutiṭṭu vaṭakarai karikāla kaṉṉavaḷanāṭṭut tirukkārkuṭiyāṉa vikkirama
coḻapurattu Uṭaiyār śrīkaiyilāsamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Ā
ticaṇṭeśvaraṉ Aruḷāl tevarkaṉmikaḷukku nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta Ūrāva
tu puttūruṭaiyāṉ nampuceyvāṉ pakkalilum peruruṭaiyāṉ cakkarava
tti pakkalilum ṭaiyāṉ mallaṉ Amarakoṉ pakkalilum vayalūruṭai
yāṉ pollāṉ kiḷiyūr veḷāṉ pakkalilum veṇṇainallūruṭaiyāṉ camai
ya mantiri pakkalilum cevaṇayuṭaiyāṉ perumāṭciyaṉāṉa cerakoṉ pakka
lilum peruruṭaiyāṉ tiruttaṉa vaḷavakoṉ pakkalilum kuḷattūruṭaiyā
ṉ pollāṉ Āṉa Āḷuṭaiyāṉ ceḻiyakoṉ pakkalilum kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ
cokkaṉ pakkalilum Ivvaṉaivar pakkaliluṅ koṇṭuṭaiyeṉāy Eṉṉu tā
ṉa Iṉṉāṭṭuṟantaiyāṉa vīracuntaraṉallūr Iṟṟai nāḷāl viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ viṟ
ṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu pa
dhakāta [6 1000] Ikkācu patiṉāṟāyiramum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟikkaic cela
vaṟak kaikkoṇṭu Inta Uṟantaiyāṉa vīracuntaranallūrum Ivvūr naṉ
cey nilam Eṭṭumāvum puṉcey nilam Eṇveliyum po
tuvum poviriyum meṉokkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Iv
vūr nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa prāpnikaA few letters in continuation are missing.
viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭut�A few letters in continuation are missing.
Āticaṇṭeśvara tevar Aruḷāl tevarkaA few letters in continuation are missing.
kaḷkku cirāmaṉ cakkaravattiyeṉ IntaA few letters in continuation are missing.
taiyāṉa vīracuntaranallūrkku Ikkācu patiṉāṟāyi
ramume vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruṇ māva
ṟutip poruṭcelavolaiyāvatākavum Ituvalla
tu veṟuporuṇmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai kā
vatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikka
ṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaik koṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramā
ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ tevarkaṉmikaḷukku cirāmaṉ cakkara
vattiyeṉ Inta Uṟantaiyāna viracuntaranallūr Ivarkaḷ dā
dhama[ navikkra] yaṅkaḷukkum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭatukkum U
rittāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam pa
ṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār śrīkayilāsamuṭaiya nāya
ṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvavaratevar Aruḷāl tevarkaṉmi
kaḷukku kattikkāṟccomaiyateṇṇāyakkar kāriyañcey
vārkaḷil cirāmaṉ cakkaravattiyeṉ Itu cirāmaṉ cakkaravatti sayi
ñjātaṉamaikku Ivar colla Ippramāṇa yicaivutiṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ
kaḷaṉaiyuṭaiyāṉ ceṭṭināṭuvāṉāṉa māṇikkavācakaṉ Eḻuttu I
ku Ivai pa ṭayāṉ Oṟṟikoṇṭāṉ tavapperumāḷāṉa nampucey
Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ camaiyañcaṉā Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ karuma
kiḻavaṉ kauri Ammaiyitillāṉ Amarakoṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vay
yāṉ po �ṉ poṉṉampala nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kovinta
paṭika nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ tirumuṉaippāṭi veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi A
ṭaiyāṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
cevaṇayuṭaiyāṉ cerakoṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai peruruṭaiyāṉ vi �viṉai tittā
ṉeṇ viṣe ca vatti Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kuḷakkuṭiyuṭaiyāṉ � calūr veḷāṉe
paṭi Aṟiveṉ peruruṭaiyāṉ civatavaṉapperumāḷeṉ I ṭi Aṟiveṉ
mpaṅkuṭai �yaṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai nāṭāmaṅkalamuṭaiyā Ama
ṉ sayiñjātaṉamaikkum Ippaṭi Aṟivukku kum puttūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvara
camaiyā Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pūlāṅkuṭaiyāṉ nampuceyvāṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai pe
ruṭaiyāṉ Āticcatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ teṉkarai nāṭṭu veḷāṉeṉ
ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vāmpalūruṭaiyāṉ cāmuṇṭi piḷḷaiyāḷā
kku Ivai maṅkala veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ peruruṭaiyāṉ ma
ṉṟu E vāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tevāra ḻakiya nallūr vaika
vūruṭaiyāṉ Iḷaiyāṉ vaṇkaiccakkaravatti Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Uṉṟak
veḷāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
